title: 11 Years Later, A Major Shonen Jump Series Is Going to End
content: It seems like Shonen Jump is set to lose another major series its last as a new report claims that Black Clover is indeed going to be ending after 11 years. Black Clover has been fast approaching its grand finale over the last year, and has even been getting into a series of “ Super Climax” updates for the last few…
author: ComicBook

title: Sakuna: Of Rice and Ruin Smartphone Game Ends Service, Shelves PC Release
content: The "rice cultivation simulation x exploration battle RPG" game launched on February 5. The game is free to play with optional item purchases. Edelweiss and TOHO Games produce the game, and G2 Studios develops the game. Edelweiss is also credited for the original work.
author: ANN

title: KPop Demon Hunters Returns With New Animated Short Almost a Year Later (Watch Now)
content: It’s been almost a year since KPop Demon Hunters made its record breaking debut with Netflix, and the franchise is celebrating with a return in a new animated short. KPop Demon Hunters has been on an absolute tear through the past year ever since it made its debut with Netflix, and the film has gone on to be the most…
author: ComicBook

title: Gido Amagakure's Yurayura Q Manga Ends
content: The June 1 issue of Hakusensha 's The Hana to Yume Kami-sama magazine announced on Monday that Gido Amagakure 's Yurayura Q manga will end in the next chapter on July 27. Amagakure launched the series in Hakusensha 's The Hana to Yume Fantasy magazine in October 2019.
author: ANN

title: Winners of 30th Tezuka Osamu Cultural Prize Announced
content: Asahi Shimbun announced the winners of the 30th Tezuka Osamu Cultural Prize on Wednesday. The awards ceremony will be held on June 11 at the Yurakucho Asahi Hall in Chiyoda, Tokyo.
author: MyAnimeList

title: '8th Loop for the Win!' Manga Artist Riku Natsume Launches New Series
content: The official X (formerly Twitter ) account for LEED Publishing 's Comic Border platform announced on Friday that 8th Loop for the Win! manga artist Riku Natsume will launch a new manga series titled Saimu Mahō Shōjo Kureca Riboca ( Debt Magical Girl Kureca Riboca ) on the platform on May 22.
author: ANN

title: Bleach Reveals First Look at New Spinoff Ahead of Anime’s Finale
content: Bleach is getting ready to make its comeback in just a few more months with the final season of the anime franchise , but it’s coming back with a new spinoff release shortly before.
author: ComicBook

title: Koji Yamamura's 'Haru no Umi,' More Japanese Short Films Compete at 2026 Annecy
content: • Short Films Official: Kōji Yamamura's "Haru no Umi" ("The Spring Sea") • Perspectives: Yakata Kanata's "Bucketman" and Ryotaro Miyajima's "Rest" • Midnight Shorts: Seishirō Nagaya's "A Couple Clucking Chickens Were Still Kickin' in the Schoolyard" from Tatsuki Fujimoto 17-26 and Ryoji Yamada's Builder • Graduation…
author: ANN

title: After 4 Years, Underrated Crunchyroll Isekai Reveals New Look for Season 2 Return
content: Four years after the first season came to an end, a major Isekai now streaming with Crunchyroll has dropped the first look trailer for its Season 2 comeback teasing a big facelift.
author: ComicBook

title: Sacrificial Princess & the King of Beasts' Yu Tomofuji Launches New Series in July
content: The June 1 issue of Hakusensha 's The Hana to Yume magazine announced on Monday that Yu Tomofuji will launch a new manga titled Kimi o Norowaba (If I Curse You) in the magazine's next issue on July 27.
author: ANN
